testcase.name: test_tiered_within_first_tier
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:180: in test_tiered_within_first_tier assert result["subtotal"] == 125.0, f"Expected 125, got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected 125, got 100.0 E assert 100.0 == 125.0

testcase.name: test_tiered_at_boundary
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:186: in test_tiered_at_boundary assert result["subtotal"] == 150.0, f"Expected 150, got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected 150, got 100.0 E assert 100.0 == 150.0

testcase.name: test_tiered_spanning_two_tiers
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:191: in test_tiered_spanning_two_tiers assert result["subtotal"] == 165.0, f"Expected 165, got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected 165, got 100.0 E assert 100.0 == 165.0

testcase.name: test_tiered_has_line_items

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 2 line items, got [{'label': 'TEST96_Tiered_Pricing', 'amount': 100.0}] assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = len([{'amount': 100.0, 'label': 'TEST96_Tiered_Pricing'}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:197: in test_tiered_has_line_items assert len(line_items) >= 2, f"Expected at least 2 line items, got {line_items}" E AssertionError: Expected at least 2 line items, got [{'label': 'TEST96_Tiered_Pricing', 'amount': 100.0}] E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'amount': 100.0, 'label': 'TEST96_Tiered_Pricing'}])

testcase.name: test_product_save_with_tiered_intake
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:245: in test_product_save_with_tiered_intake assert get_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_boolean_yes_adds_price
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:266: in test_boolean_yes_adds_price assert result["subtotal"] == 250.0, f"Expected 250, got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected 250, got 200.0 E assert 200.0 == 250.0

testcase.name: test_boolean_yes_line_item

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'Rush Delivery' line item in ['TEST96_Boolean_Pricing'] assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestBooleanPricing.test_boolean_yes_line_item.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbf9aaf6c200>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:278: in test_boolean_yes_line_item assert any("Rush Delivery" in lbl or "rush_delivery" in lbl.lower() for lbl in labels), \ E AssertionError: Expected 'Rush Delivery' line item in ['TEST96_Boolean_Pricing'] E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestBooleanPricing.test_boolean_yes_line_item.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbf9aaf6c200>)

testcase.name: test_boolean_true_string
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:284: in test_boolean_true_string assert result["subtotal"] == 250.0, f"Expected 250 for 'true', got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected 250 for 'true', got 200.0 E assert 200.0 == 250.0

testcase.name: test_floor_applied_when_below_minimum
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:300: in test_floor_applied_when_below_minimum assert result["subtotal"] == 50.0, f"Expected floor 50, got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected floor 50, got 20.0 E assert 20.0 == 50.0

testcase.name: test_ceiling_applied_when_above_maximum
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:310: in test_ceiling_applied_when_above_maximum assert result["subtotal"] == 200.0, f"Expected ceiling 200, got {result['subtotal']}" E AssertionError: Expected ceiling 200, got 300.0 E assert 300.0 == 200.0

testcase.name: test_floor_line_item_label

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected minimum pricing line item, got: ['Hours'] assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestPriceFloorCeiling.test_floor_line_item_label.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbf9aaf6c4a0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:321: in test_floor_line_item_label assert any("Minimum pricing" in lbl or "floor" in lbl.lower() for lbl in labels), \ E AssertionError: Expected minimum pricing line item, got: ['Hours'] E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestPriceFloorCeiling.test_floor_line_item_label.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbf9aaf6c4a0>)

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected maximum pricing cap line item, got: ['Hours'] assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestPriceFloorCeiling.test_ceiling_line_item_label.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbf9aaf6d2a0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:328: in test_ceiling_line_item_label assert any("Maximum pricing cap" in lbl or "cap" in lbl.lower() for lbl in labels), \ E AssertionError: Expected maximum pricing cap line item, got: ['Hours'] E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestPriceFloorCeiling.test_ceiling_line_item_label.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfbf9aaf6d2a0>)
